title: Sherpanova
subtitle: Real-time AI Avatar Assistant
description: A real-time AI avatar assistant that actively guides you on videos like cooking, bike repair, Ikea assembly, etc.
details: Sherpanova is an innovative platform using advanced AI models to provide real-time, interactive avatar assistance. It process videos to provide timestamped transcriptions and context, allowing the avatar to intelligently guide users through complex physical tasks.
keyPoints: Built a robust Next.js frontend integrated with a powerful Node.js backend.
Leveraged ElevenLabs and Whisper for high-quality voice synthesis and speech recognition.
Integrated Simli to render realistic, lip-synced AI avatars.
Implemented a queueing system with Redis for heavy video pre-processing to extract timestamped transcriptions and deep context.

title: Shae
subtitle: Xano + Node proxy on legacy DB
description: Freelance: built Node proxy to let Xano interact with a 500GB MySQL powering 6 apps; glue between legacy Laravel 5 and no-code.
details: The Shae project involved acting as the critical glue between a legacy Laravel 5 application and modern no-code platforms. The main challenge was to securely expose data from a massive 500GB MySQL database without overloading the monolithic system.
keyPoints: Built a secure Node proxy to interface with the legacy MySQL database.
Optimized queries to handle the 500GB dataset effectively.
Ensured smooth interaction with Xano as the no-code backend layer.

title: Pet Alert France
subtitle: Lost pets platform + FB automation
description: Rebuild with no-code (Xano backend, Webflow frontend). Facebook API automations + queueing. Migrated 4M+ records from MongoDB → PostgreSQL with Python.
details: Rebuilt a nationwide lost pet alert platform migrating from a legacy stack to a fast, modern no-code architecture, significantly reducing maintenance overhead.
keyPoints: Migrated over 4 million records from MongoDB to PostgreSQL using Python.
Automated Facebook posting using Facebook API Integrations.
Rebuilt the frontend completely using Webflow.
